summary.intent: Address PR review comments on secret serialization code in the moltis repo, fixing dead code, a broken doc link, and off-by-one field count errors.
summary.outcome: All three review issues were fixed (removed unused redaction helpers, fixed intra-doc link, corrected field counts for MsTeams and Telegram), verified with clippy and 267 passing tests, committed and pushed.

repo: RedactedConfig impls write 'REDACTED' directly, making serialize_secret_redacted and serialize_option_secret_redacted dead code.
serialize_struct hints must exactly match the number of fields serialized; Discord=17, Telegram=17, Slack=16, MsTeams=12.

code.finding: serialize_secret_redacted and serialize_option_secret_redacted were unused helpers; removed along with their tests.
serialize_struct field count hint was 13 but should be 12 (9 always + 3 conditional).
serialize_struct field count hint was 16 but should be 17 (13 always + 4 conditional).

workflow: After PR review fixes, resolve conversations on the PR directly after committing and pushing.
Field count audits across all sibling impls are worth doing when one off-by-one is found — Telegram had the same bug.

friction: Field count errors existed in two configs (MsTeams and Telegram), requiring manual counting of always-serialized vs conditional fields across all four config impls.
